description: Restructure workspace_init.rs into workspace_init/ module directory with mod.rs + adaptors/claude.rs
steps: Rename crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init.rs to crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/mod.rs
Create crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/adaptors/ directory
Create crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/adaptors/mod.rs with pub mod claude
Create crates/libaipm/src/workspace_init/adaptors/claude.rs as an empty file for now
Verify cargo build --workspace passes with no logic changes
Verify cargo test --workspace passes with no logic changes
Verify cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings passes

description: Create ToolAdaptor trait and ClaudeAdaptor, move Claude settings logic into adaptor
steps: Define the ToolAdaptor trait in workspace_init/mod.rs with name() -> &str and apply(&self, dir: &Path) -> Result<bool, Error>
Create ClaudeAdaptor struct in workspace_init/adaptors/claude.rs
Implement ToolAdaptor for ClaudeAdaptor, moving write_claude_settings() and merge_claude_settings() logic into apply()
Create default_adaptors() function in workspace_init/adaptors/mod.rs returning vec![Box::new(ClaudeAdaptor)]
Move the 3 Claude unit tests (claude_settings_created_fresh, claude_settings_merge_existing, claude_settings_skip_if_present) to adaptors/claude.rs
Export the adaptors module and ToolAdaptor trait from workspace_init/mod.rs
Verify cargo build --workspace passes
Verify cargo test --workspace passes — Claude tests must still pass in their new location

description: Delete vscode and copilot settings code, tests, and BDD scenarios
steps: Delete write_vscode_settings() function from workspace_init/mod.rs
Delete merge_vscode_settings() function from workspace_init/mod.rs
Delete write_copilot_config() function from workspace_init/mod.rs
Delete InitAction::VscodeSettingsWritten enum variant
Delete InitAction::CopilotConfigWritten enum variant
Delete unit tests: vscode_settings_created_fresh, vscode_settings_merge_existing, vscode_settings_skip_duplicate, copilot_config_created_fresh, copilot_config_skip_existing

Delete BDD scenarios from workspace-init.feature: 'Copilot VS Code settings point to .ai/' (lines 109-114), 'Copilot CLI MCP config stub is created' (lines 116-119), 'Existing VS Code settings are merged not overwritten' (lines 127-132)
Verify cargo build --workspace passes
Verify cargo test --workspace passes
Verify cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings passes

description: Update init() to accept adaptors slice and replace InitAction::ClaudeSettingsWritten with ToolConfigured(String)
steps: Replace InitAction::ClaudeSettingsWritten with InitAction::ToolConfigured(String)
Remove Copy derive from InitAction (String is not Copy), keep Clone and other derives
Update init() signature to accept adaptors: &[Box<dyn ToolAdaptor>]
Replace the hard-coded write_claude_settings() call in init() with a loop over adaptors calling adaptor.apply()
Push InitAction::ToolConfigured(adaptor.name().to_string()) for each successful apply
Update all tests that reference InitAction::ClaudeSettingsWritten to use ToolConfigured
Update tests that use InitAction Copy semantics to use Clone or references
Verify cargo build --workspace passes
Verify cargo test --workspace passes

description: Update CLI main.rs: pass adaptors to init(), handle ToolConfigured action, change default to marketplace-only
steps: Change default (no flags) behavior from (true, true) to (false, true) for (do_workspace, do_marketplace)
Import and call default_adaptors() from libaipm::workspace_init::adaptors
Pass adaptors to libaipm::workspace_init::init()
Replace InitAction::ClaudeSettingsWritten match arm with ToolConfigured(name) => format!('Configured {name} settings')
Delete InitAction::VscodeSettingsWritten and CopilotConfigWritten match arms
Verify cargo build --workspace passes
Verify cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings passes

description: Update BDD scenario: default init creates marketplace only (no aipm.toml)
steps: Update the 'Default init with no flags' scenario in workspace-init.feature
Change expectation from 'aipm.toml is created' to 'there is no file aipm.toml'
Keep the expectation that .ai/ and .ai/starter/ directories exist
Verify cargo test --workspace passes — BDD tests must reflect new default behavior
Verify cargo fmt --check passes

description: Full build verification — all four checks pass with zero warnings
steps: Run cargo build --workspace and verify zero errors
Run cargo test --workspace and verify all tests pass
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings and verify zero warnings
Run cargo fmt --check and verify formatting is correct
Verify no .vscode or .copilot references remain in workspace_init code (grep for vscode, copilot)
Verify ToolAdaptor trait is publicly exported from libaipm
Verify ClaudeAdaptor is publicly exported from libaipm::workspace_init::adaptors
